name: whatsapp bot AI Agent tools
description: Generated redesign of the WhatsApp bot workflow around an AI Agent with focused memory, search, image, and reply tools.

parameters.content:
## Entry and routing
Receive WhatsApp payloads, normalize fields, and route chat, record, memory, image, admin, and fallback intents.

## Agent core
Use a central WhatsApp AI Agent with a DeepSeek-compatible chat model, explicit memory instructions, and structured replies.

## Agent tools
Expose memory search, memory writes, Brave search, image actions, and status checks as focused tool branches.

## Data and memory
Keep the existing Qdrant collection whatsapp_memory intact and adapt schemas in small compatibility nodes.

## Output and errors
Format bridge replies, send them through the WhatsApp bridge, save recent AI turns, and fail softly.

assignments.name: systemInstructions
assignments.value: Use WhatsApp group memory only when it is relevant. Do not expose raw private history unless the user explicitly asks for exact wording. Keep replies natural, concise, and safe.

options.systemMessage: ={{ $json.systemInstructions || 'You are a WhatsApp group AI assistant.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { limit: 8, with_payload: true, with_vector: false, filter: { must: [{ key: "groupId", match: { value: $json.groupId } }, { key: "type", match: { value: "whatsapp_message" } }] } } }}
={{ { limit: 20, with_payload: true, with_vector: false, filter: { must: [{ key: "groupId", match: { value: $json.groupId } }, { key: "type", match: { value: "member_profile" } }] } } }}
={{ { limit: 80, with_payload: true, with_vector: false, filter: { must: [{ key: "groupId", match: { value: $json.groupId } }] } } }}
